regions: EMEA (Europe, the Middle East and Africa)

key_suppliers: Systems on Silicon Manufacturing Company Pte. Ltd. (SSMC)
VisionPower Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Pte. Ltd. (VSMC)
supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on third-party foundries for portion of manufacturing capacity; single-source suppliers for certain equipment and materials; dependence on TSMC joint venture (SSMC) for 8-inch wafer production; silicon wafer supply from limited number of suppliers
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions from capacity constraints; inability to obtain sufficient silicon wafers; failure of third-party suppliers to perform; industry-wide semiconductor shortages; rationing or disruption of utility supplies (electricity, gas, water); geopolitical tensions affecting supply chains; concentration risk in certain geographic regions

regulatory_risks: U.S. Export Administration Regulations and enhanced export controls on certain products
Sanctions imposed by European Union and other jurisdictions
EU General Data Privacy Regulation (GDPR) and global privacy legislation
U.S. outbound investment rules restricting cross-border investments in semiconductor businesses
Environmental, health and safety laws and regulations governing emissions, wastewater, hazardous substances, waste disposal
Environmental permits and authorizations required for operations
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax (15% minimum tax rate)
Netherlands alternative minimum tax law based on OECD global anti-base erosion model rules
Trade barriers and tariffs (including potential new or increased tariffs between U.S. and China)
AI technology regulations and industry standards
Compliance with extensive regulatory requirements for government grants and subsidies
Labor and health and safety laws in multiple jurisdictions
Disclosure and reporting requirements (including ESG-related data)
Cybersecurity regulations and data protection laws
Automotive safety and emissions regulations (ASIL-D functional safety requirements)
Semiconductor industry certifications (ISO 27001, Common Criteria, PCI DSS, GSMA Security)

sanction_risks: U.S. sanctions on Russia due to Ukraine invasion
Export restrictions to certain customers (e.g., Huawei shipment suspension in 2020)
Potential sanctions on industry sectors and parties
Regional instability from Middle East hostilities and armed conflict
Geopolitical tensions between China and Taiwan affecting supply chains
Trade disputes between U.S. and China with potential tariff increases
Risk of nationalization and expropriation of operations or property
Decoupling of global trade networks due to sustained geopolitical tensions
